For small businesses, choose Dropbox for small business friendly features. For best Data Backup, choose Backblaze. For analysis, choose Google Drive. For enterprise, choose Carbonite. We recommend Dropbox for small businesses combined with Backblaze for best Data Backup, for optimal results.
